narrative:
Morgan Twp township has 1,493 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points.
